analysis.name: Stellar
analysis.summary: XLM 24小时涨幅12.58%，受RWA叙事、DTCC合作、实物黄金锚定等利好推动，但30日跌幅23%，短期反弹需谨慎。

recommendation.invalidation: 跌破0.18美元支撑或DTCC合作进展不及预期

catalysts: RWA（真实世界资产）代币化叙事升温，Stellar上代币化资产数量是XRP的9倍
DTCC合作预期（新闻提及Stellar trades at $0.18 before DTCC catalyst）
实物1:1锚定黄金上线（Stellar Scores Physical 1:1 Backed Gold）

latestNews.title: XLM Price Forecast Sees $0.26 Amid Stellar RWA Expansion
latestNews.reason: 分析师给出目标价0.26美元，较当前价有约30%空间

latestNews.title: Stellar Scores Physical 1:1 Backed Gold: Huge For XLM?
latestNews.reason: 实物黄金锚定资产增强Stellar在RWA领域的竞争力

latestNews.title: Stellar trades at $0.18 before DTCC catalyst
latestNews.reason: DTCC合作预期是重要催化剂，可能推动机构采用

fundamentals: Stellar是开源去中心化支付网络，专注于跨境支付和资产代币化
采用Stellar共识协议（SCP），交易确认快、费用低
内置去中心化交易所（DEX）和智能合约平台Soroban
由非营利组织Stellar发展基金会管理
流通供应量约340亿XLM，总供应量约500亿，无最大供应上限
marketRead: 24小时涨幅12.58%，但30日跌幅23%，短期反弹力度较强
当前价格0.199美元，距历史高点0.875美元仍有77%跌幅
DEX上XLM/USDC交易对流动性充足（5.3亿美元），但24小时交易量仅545美元，流动性深度与交易量不匹配，可能存在价格操纵风险
市场情绪偏多（看涨比例61.11%），但需警惕短期获利回吐
risks: DEX交易量极低（24小时仅545美元），价格容易被操纵
无最大供应上限，通胀压力长期存在
DTCC合作尚未正式确认，存在预期落空风险
XLM与XRP高度相关，XRP走势可能拖累XLM
watchlist: Stellar上RWA代币化资产数量增长
XLM价格能否站稳0.20美元并突破0.22美元阻力
整体市场情绪和比特币走势
sourceNotes: DEX数据来自Raydium，流动性高但交易量异常低，需谨慎对待价格
新闻来源多为聚合网站，部分内容可能重复或过时
基本面数据来自CoinGecko，市场排名第15

profile.name: Stellar
profile.description: Stellar is an open-source, decentralized network co-founded in 2014 by Jed McCaleb and Joyce Kim to facilitate the fast and low-cost transfer of value across different currencies and assets globally. Managed by the non-profit Stellar Development Foundation, the project serves as a global infrastructure that connects banks, payment systems, and individuals to expand financial access to underserved populations. Its main value proposition lies in providing a bridge between traditional money and digital networks through the use of Anchors, which are trusted entities that hold deposits and issue credits on the ledger. The network operates using the Stellar Consensus Protocol and a Federated Byzantine Agreement, where nodes choose trusted sets of other nodes to agree on the state of the ledger. This system ensures high throughput and fast finality, where transactions are considered permanent and irreversible within seconds. Key features include a built-in distributed exchange for trading assets without intermediaries and the Soroban platform for developing smart contracts. Users can also utilize the network for tokenizing real-world assets or accessing decentralized finance services like
